title: Supremely Optimized
description: Minecraft optimization as it should be...
body:
Supremely Optimized is a modpack focused on lightweight and optimized minecraft.

New world gen on vanilla is an avg of 19.5 seconds, while supremely optimized is an avg of 5.59. 
Both are tested with 5 new worlds but results may vary

Main mods everybody knows:
- Sodium
- Iris
- Ferrite
- Starlight

This is extremely inspired by Fabulously Optimized
- Fab Op:https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized
